purpose: Counterfactual perturbation audit used to avoid local optima and catch silent drift away from the user's original requirements.

perturbations.change: Reframe product as general English teaching system
perturbations.expected_failure: breaks exam-first promise and paid trust model

perturbations.change: Reduce physical space to favorite box plus sleep box
perturbations.expected_failure: destroys knowledge-map semantics and core differentiation

perturbations.change: Remove detailed box catalog and keep only library/group skeleton
perturbations.expected_failure: drops content team's knowledge decomposition asset

perturbations.change: Treat hint as standalone card type
perturbations.expected_failure: breaks card authoring model and user-specified hint behavior

perturbations.change: Treat audio as independent interaction family
perturbations.expected_failure: adds an interaction family the user explicitly rejected

perturbations.change: Require heavy self-rating on every card
perturbations.expected_failure: increases software cost and breaks fluent continuity

perturbations.change: Make free-after-trial equivalent to full experience
perturbations.expected_failure: weakens paywall structure and contradicts user input

perturbations.change: Return to prose-first active docs
perturbations.expected_failure: moves active truth away from agent-first structured harness

perturbations.change: Drop peek from visible card actions
perturbations.expected_failure: removes a user-confirmed low-cost learning action

perturbations.change: Shrink free-after-trial into a tiny demo instead of near-half normal learning
perturbations.expected_failure: breaks the intended free-to-paid value bridge

perturbations.change: Turn physical space into either arbitrary free drag or fully locked system
perturbations.expected_failure: breaks the partial-control model specified by the user

perturbations.change: Assume one adaptive UI can cover phone, tablet, and PC web without dedicated design
perturbations.expected_failure: breaks the explicit multi-surface product requirement

perturbations.change: Treat PC as a separate native desktop client or drop Web parity
perturbations.expected_failure: misstates the release matrix and priority model

perturbations.change: Require exact same-card cross-device resume as product truth
perturbations.expected_failure: over-constrains continuity beyond what the user asked for

perturbations.change: Allow membership to diverge across iOS, Android, and Web or make Web non-purchasable
perturbations.expected_failure: breaks unified entitlement and all-surface commerce requirement

perturbations.change: Make audio unavailable on Web or tie it to one interaction family
perturbations.expected_failure: breaks audio content parity and misstates audio's role

perturbations.change: Demote physical space below top-level entry on one or more release targets
perturbations.expected_failure: breaks the required entry structure across surfaces

perturbations.change: Allow guest learning before login
perturbations.expected_failure: breaks the required authentication gate before learning starts

perturbations.change: Use a different login method or start trial at install/registration time
perturbations.expected_failure: breaks the confirmed authentication and trial trigger policy

perturbations.change: Change top-level navigation across release targets or drop keyboard/mouse adaptation on non-touch surfaces
perturbations.expected_failure: breaks confirmed navigation consistency and non-touch input policy
must_preserve_source_anchors: 三端信息架构导航是一致的：学习 空间 统计 我的

perturbations.change: Autoplay audio or require front-side subtitles
perturbations.expected_failure: breaks confirmed audio presentation policy
must_preserve_source_anchors: 不自动播放，没有字幕（背面可以有）

perturbations.change: Promote module-first learning or treat free module choice as equal to the main learning flow
perturbations.expected_failure: breaks guided low-burden sequencing and reintroduces user-side mode switching as primary learning work
must_preserve_source_anchors: 建议用户按照我们拟定的顺序学习，不建议用户按模块学习

perturbations.change: Treat direct development or direct push on main as normal workflow
perturbations.expected_failure: bypasses review flow and destroys the read-only integration baseline

perturbations.change: Use two library identity colors simultaneously as strong accents on a single screen (e.g. listening indigo CTA + vocabulary rose highlight together)
perturbations.expected_failure: breaks Law of One and dissolves the library identity semantics the user can learn to navigate by

perturbations.change: Re-inflate self-assess feedback from 2 levels (有把握/再回看) back to 4 levels (掌握/知道/不确定/忘了)
perturbations.expected_failure: violates product-core user_cost_minimization ('反复做高成本掌握度判断') and diverges from apps/mobile/src/learning/LearningSurface.tsx canonical implementation

perturbations.change: Paint the review self-assess level red (#F15B6E) instead of amber, implying '错了/惩罚'
perturbations.expected_failure: turns a warm 'come back to this' signal into punishment, contradicting the light_self_assess semantic in spec/interactions.json

perturbations.change: Ship visual output (screens, mocks, reference HTML changes) without answering the design_review_checklist
perturbations.expected_failure: removes the last gate between agent-produced design and user review; reintroduces taste drift and layout bugs that the checklist would have caught

perturbations.change: Promote hex values in visual-language.json#implementation_hypothesis into inflexible product_truth and enforce them as literal strings across all docs and code
perturbations.expected_failure: collapses the implementation_hypothesis layer and makes micro-tuning a governance event; only the 7 library identities + 2 self-assess hexes belong in the locked mirror set

perturbations.change: Treat local dirty working tree as acceptable default delivery for code-changing tasks
perturbations.expected_failure: drops reviewable artifacts and makes branch / PR history optional instead of default

perturbations.change: Leave a reviewed green pull request waiting for explicit user merge instruction
perturbations.expected_failure: reintroduces repetitive orchestration and contradicts the repo delivery default of review-then-merge

perturbations.change: Merge a pull request before agent review finishes or while required gates are red
perturbations.expected_failure: bypasses the review-and-gate contract and can land unchecked changes on main

perturbations.change: Implement user-facing UI directly from RN code or agent taste without an accepted design artifact
perturbations.expected_failure: solidifies an unreviewed visual layer into product implementation and bypasses the design-artifact gate

perturbations.change: Use a task-local design brief as the authority for the same implementation PR
perturbations.expected_failure: lets agents self-author design justification and implementation in one pass without accepted artifact review

perturbations.change: Treat core interaction motion as decorative animation added after UI implementation
perturbations.expected_failure: loses the product-specific operation, feedback, failure, and state-change semantics of core interactions

perturbations.change: Treat physical space as a normal page UI without a spatial model or state transitions
perturbations.expected_failure: collapses library/group/box/card semantics into a flat surface and weakens the product's core differentiator

perturbations.change: Treat agent review as an unrecorded convention outside required PR gates
perturbations.expected_failure: lets a PR merge without a durable review artifact even though repo delivery policy requires clean agent review before merge

perturbations.change: Promote the first AI-generated core-surface design as accepted without search, pairwise review, fragment harvest, targeted mutation, or promotion evidence
perturbations.expected_failure: turns the harness back into one-shot generation and cannot prove that the design content was optimized against softbook product constraints

required_literal_source_anchors: 三端信息架构导航是一致的：学习 空间 统计 我的
不自动播放，没有字幕（背面可以有）
建议用户按照我们拟定的顺序学习，不建议用户按模块学习

remaining_risk: future edits might shrink box catalog if not validated
future edits might over-spec implementation details unless runtime boundaries stay minimal
